name: Salmon and Potato Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the pastry mix according to package directions. Roll out onto a floured surface and cut into a circle to fit the top of a 2-quart baking dish. Cut three additional 2-inch circles from the remaining pastry and set aside.
2. Cook the potatoes and carrots in enough water to cover, in a large saucepan, for 10 minutes. Drain well.
3. Sauté the onions in 1/2 cup butter in a skillet for 5 minutes until golden brown.
4. Melt 1/2 cup butter in a small saucepan. Stir in flour, paprika, salt, and pepper. Blend in milk and simmer over medium heat until thickened and smooth, stirring constantly.
5. Layer the potatoes/carrots, salmon, and white sauce (in that order) in a greased baking dish. Dot the top with 1 tablespoon butter and place the pastry circles on top of the pie. Seal the edges and brush with an egg yolk mixture made by combining the egg yolk with water.
6. Bake in a 350°F oven for 30 to 40 minutes until the crust is brown, then serve as a main dish.
